FAQ.decorativeRightPepperAlt: Decorative pepper illustration on the right
FAQ.decorativeRightVeggieAlt: Decorative vegetable illustration on the right
FAQ.faq1Answer: Follow the feeding guide on the package and adjust based on your dog's weight and activity. Ask your vet if unsure.
FAQ.faq1Question: How can I determine the right portion size for my dog?
FAQ.faq2Answer: Gradually mix the new food with the old over 7-10 days, increasing the new food ratio each day.
FAQ.faq2Question: What is the best way to transition my dog to a new food?
FAQ.faq3Answer: Watch for symptoms like itching, digestive issues, or ear infections. Consult your vet for allergy testing.
FAQ.faq3Question: How can I tell if my dog is allergic to certain ingredients?
FAQ.faq4Answer: Try warming the food, adding toppers, or establishing a consistent feeding schedule. If issues persist, consult your vet.
FAQ.faq4Question: What should I do if my dog refuses to eat?
FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions

Features.clinicalDescription: Developed in partnership with university-led research to target gut health and long-term wellness.
Features.communityDescription: Access expert workshops, wellness guides, and research updates to become your dog's healthiest ally.
Features.environmentDescription: We craft every meal with a low-impact philosophy: responsibly sourced ingredients, reduced waste, and packaging designed to protect both your dog's health and the planet's future.
Features.pharmDescription: We apply pharmaceutical quality control to every meal, from measured ingredients to batch testing.
Features.transparentDescription: Our kitchen is always visible, and our food is always fresh — made on-site and delivered same day.

GoldenMeals.title: Golden Meals

HowItWorks.step1Description: Every great meal begins with understanding. We take the time to learn about your dog's personality, preferences, and needs — because true nourishment starts with knowing who we're feeding.
HowItWorks.step2Description: With this insight, we design a personalized meal plan, curated from the finest ingredients. Each recipe is tailored to complement your dog's lifestyle, ensuring balance, flavor, and genuine well-being.
HowItWorks.step2Title: Craft a unique plan for him
HowItWorks.step3Description: Finally, we prepare and deliver each meal with care and precision. Fresh, wholesome, and beautifully crafted — ready to delight your dog and bring peace of mind to you.
HowItWorks.title: How it Works

LatestProducts.description: See what's trending in the market. Explore a wide variety of newly released products in our featured catalog.
LatestProducts.title: Our latest products

Reviews.review1Quote: More energy and joy at mealtime.
Reviews.review1Text: My older dog was starting to get picky with his food and had lost some of his energy. Since switching to Purely Golden Foods, he's like a puppy again! He gobbles up his meals and has so much more pep in his step. Thank you for giving my furry friend a healthier and happier life!
Reviews.review2Quote: Healthy, human-grade meals my puppy loves.
Reviews.review2Text: I'm a new puppy parent and was worried about finding a food that was both healthy and appealing to my little guy. He absolutely loves the Purely Golden Foods meals! I love that it's human-grade and made with real ingredients I recognize. Plus, knowing it's good for him gives me such peace of mind.
Reviews.review3Quote: Best decision for my dog's health.
Reviews.review3Text: After years of trying different brands, I finally found what works for my sensitive golden. No more digestive issues, and his coat has never looked better! The quality is unmatched, and I can tell he feels great. Worth every penny for the peace of mind and visible results.
Reviews.title: Trusted by Devoted Dog Parents

benefits.benefit1: Oatmeal is great for dogs with wheat sensitivities or allergies, and will help your pup feel full all day long.
benefits.benefit2: Made with restaurant-grade, extra-lean beef, and good for fat-restricted diets.
benefits.benefit3: Organic white quinoa is a gluten-free pseudo-grain and healthy carbohydrate. Helps support metabolism, blood sugar levels and brain function.

Detail.lambDescription: Our Lamb Recipe features premium New Zealand lamb as the primary protein source, paired with easily digestible carbohydrates and essential nutrients for dogs with sensitivities or those who prefer a novel protein.
Detail.lambIngredientsList: Premium New Zealand lamb, easily digestible carbohydrates, essential nutrients, and carefully selected supplements.
Detail.seafoodDescription: Our Seafood Recipe combines wild-caught salmon and whitefish to deliver exceptional omega-3 fatty acids, supporting cognitive function, joint health, and a lustrous coat.
Detail.seafoodIngredientsList: Wild-caught salmon, whitefish, omega-3 rich ingredients, and carefully selected supplements.
Detail.subtitle: A complete and balanced formula
Detail.turkeyDescription: Our Turkey Recipe is crafted with premium, human-grade turkey as the first ingredient, combined with nutrient-dense vegetables and carefully selected supplements to provide complete and balanced nutrition for adult dogs.
Detail.turkeyIngredientsList: Lean ground turkey, 100% whole grain oats, spinach, wild blueberries, blackberries, beef liver, goji berries, omega-3 fish oil (anchovy), supplement blend.

BlogIndex.heroHeadline: Clinical Notes from the Kitchen Lab
BlogIndex.heroSubheadline:
Unpacking canine nutrition—the physiology, the science and the
standards most labels don't explain.

BlogPost.disclaimer: Educational only. Not medical advice. Consult your veterinarian for individual guidance.
BlogPost.referencesDescription: Includes peer-reviewed sources when available; some topics rely on established clinical practice

BlogPostCTA.description: Take our quiz where we get to know your dog to recommend the perfect meal plan according to their unique profile.
BlogPostCTA.title: Ready to Optimize Your Dog's Nutrition?

PromiseOfCareAlert.message: Our Promise of Care: Every recipe is formulated to meet pharmaceutical grade standards for quality and digestibility. If your dog doesn't respond as expected, our nutrition team will work with you to make it right.

Introduction.column1: Crafted with insights from the European College of Veterinary and Comparative Nutrition, our approach merges science with culinary expertise. Each formula is based on in-depth research into canine health, emphasizing digestion and nutrient impact. This collaboration elevates nutrition to a luxurious, clinically sound care strategy.
Introduction.column2: Our recipes reflect a commitment to precise nutrient calibration, evaluating each ingredient for purity and bioavailability. This ensures optimal ratios of amino acids, fatty acids, and antioxidants, creating meals that nourish the microbiome and support long-term wellness.

DiscoverPlans.title: Discover our Plans
DiscoverPlans.description: Take our quick quiz to get a meal plan tailored to your dog's unique needs.

Ingredients.title: Ingredient Library
Ingredients.description: Our carefully selected ingredients are chosen for their nutritional benefits and digestibility.

basil.name: Basil
basil.description: Basil is a versatile herb that brings a vibrant flavor to a variety of dishes. Packed with antioxidants, it helps fight free radicals in the body. Moreover, basil possesses anti-inflammatory properties and supports digestive health. Its fragrant leaves elevate the taste of sauces, salads, and even drinks, making it an excellent choice for both cooking and garnishing. We source our basil from local organic farms from Boston to ensure the highest quality.

pumpkin.name: Pumpkin
pumpkin.description: Pumpkin is a nutrient-dense ingredient that provides essential vitamins and minerals for your dog's well-being. High in fiber and beta-carotene, it supports digestive health and immune function. The natural fiber content helps maintain healthy digestion and can aid in weight management. Rich in antioxidants, pumpkin also contributes to overall cellular health and helps protect against oxidative stress. We carefully select fresh, organic pumpkins to provide the best nutritional benefits.

turmeric.name: Turmeric
turmeric.description: Turmeric is a powerful spice known for its remarkable health benefits. It contains curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compound that helps reduce inflammation throughout the body. This golden spice supports joint health, promotes healthy digestion, and contributes to overall wellness. Turmeric's natural properties make it an excellent addition to your dog's diet, helping to maintain mobility and support the body's natural healing processes. We use premium-grade turmeric to ensure maximum potency and effectiveness.

avocado.name: Avocado
avocado.description: Avocado is a nutrient-rich superfood that offers numerous health benefits for your dog. Rich in healthy monounsaturated fats and vitamin E, it supports skin and coat health, giving your pet a shiny, healthy appearance. The high fiber content aids in digestion and helps maintain a healthy weight. Avocados also contain essential vitamins and minerals that support overall wellness, including potassium, folate, and various B vitamins. We source only the finest, perfectly ripe avocados to provide optimal nutrition.

raspberry.name: Raspberries
raspberry.description: Raspberries are a delicious and nutritious fruit packed with vitamins, minerals, and powerful antioxidants. These vibrant berries support immune function and help protect cells from damage caused by free radicals. Rich in vitamin C, manganese, and dietary fiber, raspberries contribute to overall health and well-being. The natural antioxidants found in raspberries, including ellagic acid and anthocyanins, provide anti-inflammatory benefits and support cardiovascular health. We select only the freshest, organic raspberries to ensure your dog receives the highest quality nutrition.

lamb.name: Lamb
lamb.description: Lamb is a high-quality protein source that provides essential amino acids and B vitamins crucial for your dog's health. This lean meat is rich in iron, zinc, and selenium, supporting muscle development and overall vitality. Lamb is particularly beneficial for dogs with food sensitivities, as it's less commonly used in commercial pet foods. The complete amino acid profile supports healthy muscle maintenance, while B vitamins help maintain energy levels and support metabolic function. We source our lamb from trusted, sustainable farms that prioritize animal welfare and quality.

soybeans.name: Soy Beans
soybeans.description: Soybeans are a complete plant protein that provides all essential amino acids your dog needs for optimal health. These versatile legumes are rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to support heart health and provide antioxidant benefits. Soybeans are an excellent source of fiber, supporting digestive health and helping to maintain healthy cholesterol levels. They also contain essential minerals like iron, calcium, and magnesium, contributing to strong bones and overall wellness. We use only non-GMO, organic soybeans to ensure the highest quality and nutritional value for your pet.

Precision.title:
Precision
in Every Batch
Precision.description: Every recipe begins with meticulous batch weighing, ensuring each nutrient-rich ingredient is measured with absolute precision before it enters our kitchens. Throughout preparation, detailed temperature logs are maintained to safeguard nutrient integrity and preserve optimal enzymatic activity. From sourcing to plating, every step follows a rigorously controlled prep process—uniting culinary craftsmanship with scientific discipline to deliver nutrition at its most pure, consistent, and elevated.
Precision.imageAlt: Freshly prepared nutritious meal with measuring spoon

Research.title: Clinical Research
Research.description1: By analyzing feeding rhythm and gut response, we can reduce bloating, stomach sensitivity, and stool irregularities. Better digestion leads to better behavior, comfort, and mood — transforming mealtime into a predictable and enjoyable experience.
Research.description2: We selected Cornell University for our clinical research due to its renowned expertise in nutrition and digestive health. The university's cutting-edge facilities and commitment to innovative research ensure that our findings are based on the latest scientific advancements. Additionally, Cornell's collaborative environment fosters interdisciplinary studies, allowing us to explore the intricate connections between diet, digestion, and overall well-being.
Research.valueProp1Description: Evaluated via stool frequency, and ease of passage to monitor digestive tolerance and efficiency.
Research.valueProp2Description: Tracked using blood glucose, lipid profile, and key metabolic enzymes to quantify systemic nutritional impact.
Research.valueProp3Description: Measured through coat density, shedding rate, and skin hydration scores to assess barrier function.
Research.step1Description1: Understanding a dog's behavior is key to building a nutrition plan that truly fits their needs. Studies show a 12% increase in positive interactions when feeding routines align with their temperament and daily habits. Dogs who feel understood and engaged show clearer signs of satisfaction and emotional stability.
Research.step1Description2: By observing interaction patterns, we can better predict feeding preferences and stress triggers. This insight helps shape customized plans that support not just physical nourishment, but emotional wellness as well — building stronger bonds between dogs and their humans.
Research.step2Description1: Clinical data reveals that 42% of dogs reach a healthier nutritional balance when their diets are adapted according to age, breed, weight, and metabolic status. Personalized feeding transforms nutrition from generic to precision-based, helping each dog reach their ideal condition.
Research.step2Description2: These improvements are often seen in coat quality, energy levels, digestion, and weight management. By adjusting macronutrients and portion sizes, we can create a plan that supports long-term vitality and overall health — without guesswork.
Research.step3Description1: A 22% reduction in digestive issues was observed when portion timing and meal formats were optimized. Factors like consistency, ingredient sourcing, and digestion rate play a major role in how a dog absorbs nutrients and feels after meals.
Research.step3Description2: By analyzing feeding rhythm and gut response, we can reduce bloating, stomach sensitivity, and stool irregularities. Better digestion leads to better behavior, comfort, and mood — transforming mealtime into a predictable and enjoyable experience.

Hero.title: About us
Hero.subtitle: Discover who we are and what drives us.

Values.card1Description: We believe that true care blends precision and compassion. Every recipe is guided by clinical research and crafted with heartfelt intention, proving that nourishment can be intelligent and deeply felt, combining quality with the warmth of genuine love for animals.
Values.card2Description: Our mission is to transform pet nutrition through pharmaceutical-grade standards and thoughtful innovation. Each meal is designed to support the health and happiness of pets while honoring the planet we all share, turning daily feeding into an act of care.
Values.card3Description: Integrity and empathy guide everything we do, from our founder's devotion to her own dogs to every partnership we form. We hold ourselves to uncompromising standards because pets deserve the same level of care and intention we give ourselves.

Leadership.paragraph1: At our dedicated dog food company, we are deeply committed to enhancing the lives of animals through exceptional nutrition that is specifically tailored to meet their unique needs. Our passion drives us to actively collaborate with local shelters and rescue organizations, allowing us to create a meaningful and lasting impact within our community.
Leadership.paragraph2: By joining forces with these vital organizations, we aim not only to provide nutritious meals that promote health and vitality but also to host engaging and fun adoption events that help pets find their forever homes. Through these initiatives, we believe we can make a significant difference in the lives of these animals, ensuring they receive the love, care, and attention they truly deserve. Together, we can foster a compassionate environment where every pet has the opportunity to thrive and be cherished.

Mission.paragraph1: At Purely Golden Foods, our incredible journey began with a simple yet profound goal: to bring wholesome, pumpkin-powered nutrition to every beloved furry friend, ensuring they thrive and enjoy a vibrant, healthy life.
Mission.paragraph2: We embarked on an amazing adventure driven by a heartfelt mission: to deliver nutritious, pumpkin-infused meals to every cherished pet, helping them flourish and live a lively, healthy life.
Mission.subsectionText: Integrity and empathy guide everything we do, from our founder's devotion to her own dogs to every partnership we form. We hold ourselves to uncompromising standards because pets deserve the same level of care and intention we give ourselves.  Our commitment extends beyond just providing services; we strive to create a community where pet owners feel supported and understood. By fostering relationships built on trust and compassion, we ensure that every pet receives the love and attention they truly deserve.
Mission.title:
The Art of our 
 Ingredients

Commitment.card1: We believe that true care blends precision and compassion.
Commitment.card2: Each meal is designed to support the health and happiness of pets.
Commitment.card3: We hold ourselves to uncompromising standards because pets deserve the same level of care as we.
Commitment.title: Our Commitment

Experts.ecvcnParagraph1: We're excited about our active collaboration with
Experts.ecvcnParagraph3: , a partnership aimed at improving the quality of pet nutrition. Together, we're working on innovative solutions that focus on health and sustainability for pets.
Experts.expert1Description: Dr. Willis-Mahn brings nearly two decades of clinical experience in small animal internal medicine and nutrition.
Experts.expert2Description: Dr. Samuel Thompson has nearly 20 years of experience in small animal internal medicine and nutrition.
Experts.expert3Description: Dr. Emily Hartman has nearly three decades of experience in small animal internal medicine and nutrition.
Experts.title: Meet the Experts
